title: An Orange Sleeve
content:
In the fifth month,
    When orange-trees
    Fill all the world with scent,
    I think of the sleeve
    Of a girl who loved me.

    From the Japanese of Nari-hira.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator) delivers a powerful performance in "An Orange Sleeve"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
